calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Award
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Salama, Esq. 415-948-9030 for Petitioners through Court Call.
Spanish Interprter Doctor Juanita Ulloa is present.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Counsel reports the matter is uncontested and hangs up before the case is called. The Spanish interpreter is released at 9:39 am. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RYAN NATHAN, DAMON HINSON's Hearing On Petition To Confirm.

Petitioners Ryan Nathan and Damon Hinson's petition to confirm arbitration award is denied. Respondent Michael Shepherd timely rejected the arbitration award in compliance with Business & Professions Code 6204(c) by filing a lawsuit in Alameda County on August 8, 2018. Even if venue was improper in Alameda County, the Alameda Superior Court has "jurisdiction over the amount of money in controversy" per section 6204(c) and Mr. Shepherd filed the Alameda County action within 30 days after service of the award. While ADR-104 states that a request for trial must be filed with the complaint commencing the new action, there is nothing in the Business & Professions Code that requires that the filing of the rejection notice and the complaint occur at the same time. The filing of the complaint clearly indicated that Mr. Shepherd rejected the award. Mr. Shepherd filed an ADR-104 form in the Alameda action. The delay in filing the ADR-104 form in the Alameda action after the 30-day period did not prejudice petitioners and there is a liberal policy to hear cases on the merits. In Giorgianni v. Crowley (2011) 197 Cal.App.4th 1462, 1481, the court construed section 6204(c) in a manner to promote resolution of fee disputes on the merits. Mr. Shepherd timely rejected the award and, even if he did not, he acted reasonably under the circumstances and is entitled to relief per CCP 473(b).

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
